activities.title: Build Connection URL
activities.description: websocket_url_for_path(): convert https→wss scheme, append /responses path, preserve query params

activities.title: Build Connection Headers
activities.description: Merge provider headers + extra headers + defaults. Auth via add_auth_headers_to_header_map. Include: Authorization, originator, chatgpt-account-id, x-codex-turn-state, x-codex-turn-metadata, x-client-request-id, OpenAI-Beta (responses_websockets=2026-02-06), x-responsesapi-include-timing-metrics

activities.title: Establish WS Handshake
activities.description: connect_async_tls_with_config: TLS via rustls with custom CA support, permessage-deflate compression enabled via WebSocketConfig, connect timeout enforcement

activities.title: Capture Response Headers
activities.description: Extract from handshake response: x-reasoning-included (bool), x-models-etag (string), openai-model (string), x-codex-turn-state (set OnceLock)

activities.title: Cache Connection Per Session
activities.description: WebsocketSession stored in ModelClient.cached_websocket_session (StdMutex). ModelClientSession takes ownership on creation, returns on Drop. Reused across turns within same session

activities.title: Detect Account Change
activities.description: Compare current accountId with connection's accountId. On mismatch: close existing WS, delete from cache, open new connection with correct auth
